title: Link-rot / GUID-drift CI dashboard (OER URL + CASE GUID resolver, generated in CI)
context: OER are abundant and free but are not indexed against the curriculum standards that govern what teachers must teach, so teachers cannot find the free resource aligned to a given standard. This project builds an open crosswalk of educator-reviewed alignment records linking OER to standards by stable CASE GUID (primary) / ASN URI (optional legacy). Two hard gates never skip: the dual licence/terms gate (gate-002) and educator review of every record. PLAN.md v0.2 adds an M3 optimization: a public link-rot / GUID-drift dashboard generated in CI that checks OER URL resolution and CASE GUID resolution for every shipped record. CASE GUIDs are minted per-publication, so framework re-publication can mint new GUIDs and old ones may cease resolving; OER URLs drift too. The refresh-023 task detects and flags staleness; this task adds a publicly visible CI-generated dashboard that turns staleness into a visible, fixable, and trust-signalling metric for downstream consumers.
objective: Build a CI-generated public dashboard that checks OER URL and CASE GUID resolution for every shipped record, surfacing link-rot and GUID-drift as a visible reuse-trust signal.
acceptanceCriteria: CI job checks every OER URL in shipped AlignmentRecords (HTTP GET; records 200/redirect/4xx/5xx per URL + date) and resolves every CASE GUID against the official CASE Network source; results written as a machine-readable artifact.

Dashboard generated as a static artifact in CI and published publicly; displays per-record resolution status, a summary count of live/stale/broken links, last-checked date, and a GUID-drift event log.

GUID-drift detected: when a CASE GUID that previously resolved no longer resolves, the dashboard flags it as a drift event and links to the re-resolution task pattern (consistent with the gate artifact that records the canonical publication's GUIDs).
Dashboard reads committed record data only; it does not store OER content or reproduce copyrighted standards text; no PII.
Code MIT; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint green; commit is DCO signed-off; no credentials or secrets committed.
resources: PLAN.md (v0.2 — link-rot/GUID-drift dashboard M3 optimization, GUID-stability reality, risk row update)
